title: Court
description: Identity and metadata for a partner court. Lives at chat/prompts/courts/<slug>/court.json alongside the corpus prompt.md. Composed into the system prompt and consumed by routing and UI layers. Schema is intentionally minimal in v1 — additional fields will be driven by partner-court needs and current practices, not preemptive design.

name.description: Full canonical court name shown in UI.

jurisdiction_level.description: Court's jurisdictional scope. Used to pick the layout/UX register without forcing the deeper jurisdiction-nesting decision yet.

state.description: USPS two-letter state code where applicable. Omit for federal or tribal courts that don't sit under a single state.

official_url.description: Court homepage URL. Must start with http:// or https://.

official_resources_url.description: Self-help / forms landing page URL. Where the corpus prompt.md should point users for authoritative court resources. Must start with http:// or https://.
